SEARCH
Package org.apache.arrow.datafusion.config

Record Class ExplainOptions

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
org.apache.arrow.datafusion.config.ExplainOptions
Record Components:
logicalPlanOnly - Whether EXPLAIN should only show the logical plan
physicalPlanOnly - Whether EXPLAIN should only show the physical plan
showStatistics - Whether to show statistics in EXPLAIN output
showSizes - Whether to show sizes in EXPLAIN output
showSchema - Whether to show schema information in EXPLAIN output
format - Output format for EXPLAIN statements
treeMaximumRenderWidth - Maximum render width for tree-style EXPLAIN output
analyzeLevel - Detail level for EXPLAIN ANALYZE output
public record ExplainOptions(Boolean logicalPlanOnly, Boolean physicalPlanOnly, Boolean showStatistics, Boolean showSizes, Boolean showSchema, ExplainFormat format, Integer treeMaximumRenderWidth, ExplainAnalyzeLevel analyzeLevel) extends Record
EXPLAIN statement configuration options. Maps to DataFusion's ExplainOptions.

All fields are nullable. A null value means the DataFusion default is used.

Example: 

ExplainOptions explain = ExplainOptions.builder()
    .showStatistics(true)
    .showSchema(true)
    .format(ExplainFormat.TREE)
    .build();
ConfigOptions config = ConfigOptions.builder()
    .explain(explain)
    .build();
See Also:
  • Rust DataFusion: ExplainOptions

  • Constructor Details

    • ExplainOptions

      public ExplainOptions(Boolean logicalPlanOnly, Boolean physicalPlanOnly, Boolean showStatistics, Boolean showSizes, Boolean showSchema, ExplainFormat format, Integer treeMaximumRenderWidth, ExplainAnalyzeLevel analyzeLevel)
      Creates an instance of a ExplainOptions record class.
      Parameters:
      logicalPlanOnly - the value for the logicalPlanOnly record component
      physicalPlanOnly - the value for the physicalPlanOnly record component
      showStatistics - the value for the showStatistics record component
      showSizes - the value for the showSizes record component
      showSchema - the value for the showSchema record component
      format - the value for the format record component
      treeMaximumRenderWidth - the value for the treeMaximumRenderWidth record component
      analyzeLevel - the value for the analyzeLevel record component

  • Method Details

    • builder

      public static ExplainOptions.Builder builder()
      Returns a new builder.

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. All components in this record class are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object).
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.
